subcodes.first_line: O thou sorrowful Leaf! Be not sad and grieve not. That is the way the world hath been since its beginning. This is God’s way
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه محزونه محزون مباش و دلخون مگرد دنیا تا بوده است چنین بوده است و هذه
subcodes.subjects: @stories; anecdotes, @consolation and comfort, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
